name: MK-677 (10MG) (50 TABLETS)
description: MK-677 (Ibutamoren) is a potent, non-peptide, orally active growth hormone secretagogue. Research-grade tablets for investigational use.

name: Follistatin (FLGR242) (10mg) Subscription
description: High-purity Follistatin glycoprotein for muscle mass tissue research. US-manufactured, independently verified with complete analytical documentation.

name: Follistatin (FLGR242) (10mg)
description: High-purity Follistatin glycoprotein for muscle mass tissue research. US-manufactured, independently verified with complete analytical documentation.

name: Klotho (alphaKlothoLR) (20mcg)
description: Research-grade klotho protein (a-Klotho) for in vitro studies. 99%+ purity with full analytical documentation for laboratory applications.

name: BioBam-15
description: BioBAM-15 is a research compound that “uncouples” mitochondria, making cells burn more fuel without producing as much usable energy.

name: BioRecharge
description: BioRecharge combines Pomegranate Extract, Urolithin A, C60 Fullerene, and Alpha-Lipoic Acid in one precision-formulated antioxidant support capsule.

name: BioScavenger (SkQ1)
description: BioScavenger (Visomitin, SkQ1 Bromide) is a mitochondria-targeted antioxidant that possesses a unique combination of high mitochondrion membrane penetrating property and potent antioxidant activity.

name: Thymulin Peptide (10mg)
description: Thymulin peptide for investigating thymic hormone mechanisms in immune cell differentiation. High-purity lyophilized powder for cellular research. Research use only compound.

name: Lepto3GR (50mcg)
description: Lepto3GR is an experimental peptide small molecule designed to act as a receptor agonist for three endogenous peptide hormones: Glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1), glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide (GIP), and glucagon (GCG).

name: SlimAssist (FLGR 2MG / 250mcg B Complex)
description:
High-purity Follistatin glycoprotein for muscle mass tissue research. US-manufactured, independently verified with complete analytical documentation.

1 month supply = 2x 5mg vials

name: Regeno Blend (BPC-157, TB-500, Cartalax) 30mg
description: Triple peptide blend combining BPC-157, TB-500, and Cartalax at 10mg each for in vitro connective tissue studies.

name: BioRegenix Recovery Cream – 4 Pack
description:
BioRegnix’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate healing abilities of your body, promoting rapid soft tissue regeneration and repair.

Infused with potent bioregulators, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating the healing process for soft tissue injuries, including aches, sprains, strains, and performance and age-related muscle pain.

name: BioRegenix Recovery Cream – 2 Pack
description:
BioRegnix’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate healing abilities of your body, promoting rapid soft tissue regeneration and repair.

Infused with potent bioregulators, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating the healing process for soft tissue injuries, including aches, sprains, strains, and performance and age-related muscle pain.

name: BioRegenix Recovery Cream – 6 Pack
description:
BioRegnix’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate healing abilities of your body, promoting rapid soft tissue regeneration and repair.

Infused with potent bioregulators, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating the healing process for soft tissue injuries, including aches, sprains, strains, and performance and age-related muscle pain.

name: BioRegenix Recovery Cream – 3 Pack
description:
BioRegnix’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate healing abilities of your body, promoting rapid soft tissue regeneration and repair.

Infused with potent bioregulators, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating the healing process for soft tissue injuries, including aches, sprains, strains, and performance and age-related muscle pain.

name: ShredMAX – Slu-PP-332
description: ShredMAX is a research peptide formulation containing ERRα/β/γ agonist SLU-PP-332 at 100mg per capsule for mitochondrial research.

name: BioZapetite
description:
BioZapetite delivers orforglipron (6 mg), a first-in-class oral, small-molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist designed for investigational use. Unlike peptide GLP-1 agonists, orforglipron is orally bioavailable without fasting or water restrictions and demonstrates robust pharmacology in glucose and weight regulation.

Together, its mechanisms are designed to:

  • Promote glucose disposal & insulin sensitivity
  • Drive weight reduction & appetite control
  • Improve lipid & cardiometabolic health
  • Provide oral dosing convenience
  • Exhibit a safety profile consistent with injectable GLP-1 medicines.

name: BioIgnite
description:
BioIgnite is an integrated metabolic-activation formula that combines a thermogenic amino acid, a neurostimulant alkaloid, an inflammation-modulating kinase inhibitor, and a selective β₂-adrenergic agonist. Together they are designed to:

  • Enhance thermogenesis & fat oxidation
  • Improve glucose disposal & insulin sensitivity
  • Reduce metabolic inflammation
  • Amplify mitochondrial energy metabolism

name: BioMale – Natural Geroprotector Complex (GPL Man)
description:
BioMale® is a new complex geroprotector based on peptide extracts from the pancreas, vessels, cerebrum, liver, pineal gland, and testicles, specifically formulated for men’s health.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioFemale – Natural Peptide Geroprotector (GPL Femme)
description:
BioFemale® is an innovative complex geroprotector created from peptide extracts of pineal gland, brain, vessels, liver, thyroid, and ovaries, specifically formulated for women’s health.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioThyroid – A-2 Thyroid Peptide Bioregulator (Thyreogen)
description:
BioThyroid is a dietary supplement consisting of a natural peptide complex extracted from the thyroid glands of young animals, formulated to function as a thyroid gland bioregulator.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioThymus – A-6 Thymus Peptide Bioregulator (Vladonix)
description:
BioThymus (A-6) is a dietary supplement containing natural peptide complex A-6, isolated from the thymus glands of young animals.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioTestes – A-13 Testes Peptide Bioregulator (Testoluten)
description:
BioTestes (A-13) is a peptide complex derived from the testes of young animals, formulated to support and restore male reproductive system function by providing tissue-specific peptides that help normalize metabolism, enhance sperm motility, and regulate testosterone production.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioRetina – A-11 Retina Peptide Bioregulator (Visoluten)
description:
BioRetina (A-11) is a natural peptide bioregulator complex featuring eye tissues peptides formulated to support the health of the retina, cornea, and eye blood vessels.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioStomach – A-10 Stomach Peptide Bioregulator (Stamakort)
description:
BioStomach (A-10) is a natural peptide complex extracted from the gastric mucosa of young animals that selectively targets stomach cells to normalize their metabolism and regulate their functions.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioProstate – A-16 Prostate Peptide Bioregulator (Libidon)
description:
BioProstate (A-16) is a natural dietary supplement containing Peptide Complex A-16 derived from bovine prostate tissue, formulated to support prostate health by addressing issues like benign prostatic enlargement, chronic prostatitis, erectile dysfunction, and male infertility.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioPineal – A-8 Pineal Peptide Bioregulator (Endoluten)
description:
BioPineal (A-8) is a dietary supplement containing natural pineal gland peptides that may normalize pineal gland function by reducing peptide deficiency and restoring protein synthesis inside cells.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioParathyroid – A-21 Peptide Bioregulator (Bonothyrk)
description:
BioParathyroid (A-21) is a parathyroid peptide complex containing natural peptides isolated from the parathyroid glands of young, healthy animals that supports metabolism and functional activity of parathyroid gland cells.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioPancreas – A-1 Pancreas Peptide Bioregulator (Suprefort)
description:
BioPancreas (A-1) is a dietary supplement containing natural pancreas peptides extracted from young animals that normalizes pancreatic function by reducing peptide deficiency.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioOvary – A-15 Ovary Peptide Bioregulator (Zhenoluten)
description:
BioOvary (A-15) is a dietary supplement and ovary peptide bioregulator (A-15) containing a complex of natural peptides extracted from the ovaries of young animals.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioNervousSystem – A-5 Nervous System Peptide Bioregulator (Cerluten)
description:
BioNervousSystem® is a dietary supplement containing natural brain peptides derived from the cerebral cortex of young animals, formulated to regulate metabolism in brain cells and support central nervous system function.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioMuscle – A-18 Muscle Peptide Bioregulator (Gotratix)
description:
BioMuscle is a dietary supplement containing peptide complex A-18 derived from the triceps muscle of young calves, formulated to support muscle metabolism, combat muscle fatigue, and normalize muscle function.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioLung – A-19 Lung Peptide Bioregulator (Taxorest)
description:
BioLung is a dietary supplement formulated with natural bronchial mucous peptides to promote respiratory health by supporting the normalization of bronchial mucosa metabolism.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioLiver – A-7 Liver Peptide Bioregulator (Svetinorm)
description:
BioLiver is a natural liver peptide complex formulated to support and normalize liver function by enhancing protein synthesis and aiding in the regeneration of liver cells.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioKidney – A-9 Kidney Peptide Bioregulator (Pielotax)
description:
BioKidney is a dietary supplement containing natural kidney peptides that have a selective effect on kidney tissue cells, normalizing metabolism and regulating function of the urinary system.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioHeart – A-14 Heart Peptide Bioregulator (Chelohart)
description:
BioHeart is a dietary supplement containing natural peptide fractions derived from the heart muscle of young animals, which has a selective effect on myocardial cells to normalize metabolism and support heart function.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioCartilage – A-4 Cartilage Peptide Bioregulator (Sigumir)
description:
BioCartilage is a natural peptide complex extracted from cartilage and bone tissues of young animals that may regulate metabolism and functions of the spine and joints, helping normalize cartilage tissue cells and reduce the risk of various joint and spine diseases such as arthritis, rheumatism, osteochondrosis, and osteoporosis.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioBoneMarrow – A-20 Peptide Bioregulator (Bonomarlot)
description:
BioBoneMarrow is a natural peptide complex derived from the bone marrow of young animals that contains peptide complex A-20, which may selectively target and normalize the hematopoietic system.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioBloodVessels – A-3 Blood Vessels Peptide Bioregulator (Ventfort)
description:
BioBloodVessels is a natural peptide bioregulator complex derived from the blood vessels of young animals, formulated to support and help regulate the vascular system.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioBladder – A-12 Bladder Peptide Bioregulator (Chitomur)
description:
BioBladder is a natural peptide complex derived from the bladders of young animals that may support and restore bladder function.

40mg/capsule.

name: BioAdrenal – A-17 Adrenal Peptide Bioregulator (Glandokort)
description:
BioAdrenal is a dietary supplement containing natural adrenal gland peptides (A-17) that may normalize adrenal function by reducing peptide deficiency and improving the performance of the adrenal gland.

40mg/capsule

name: BioAmpMax
description: BioAmpMax is an integrated metabolic formula that combines a pan-AMPK activator, an NNMT inhibitor, inositol mediators, a trace mineral cofactor, and an antioxidant precursor. For research use only.

name: BioAmp
description: BioAmp is a targeted metabolic-support formula featuring a single, high-potency dose of the pan-AMPK activator ATX-304 (OS-01). For laboratory research use only.

name: BioFlow
description: BioFlow is an advanced formulation combining low-dose tesofensine, taurine, and magnesium L-threonate to support metabolic balance, vascular health, and cognitive function studies. For research use only.

name: BioAbsorb
description: BioAbsorb is an integrated metabolic research formula that pairs low-dose metformin and highly bio-available dihydroberberine with activated B-complex cofactors.

name: Vesugen Peptide (20mg)
description: Vesugen peptide (Lys-Glu-Asp) – Research-grade tripeptide bioregulator for vascular system studies and endothelial cell research applications.

name: Vesilute Peptide (20mg)
description: Research-grade Vesilute bioregulator peptide (Glu-Asp) for laboratory studies investigating urinary and prostate cellular mechanisms.

name: Thymagen (Thymogen) (20mg)
description: Research-grade Thymagen dipeptide bioregulator for laboratory studies of thymus function and immune cell differentiation.

name: Testagen Peptide (20mg)
description: Research-grade Testagen peptide (KEDG) for examining pituitary and thyroid gland interactions in laboratory models. Lyophilized for stability. Research use only.

name: Prostamax Peptide (20mg)
description: Prostamax synthetic Khavinson peptide for prostate cell culture research applications. Research use only.

name: Pancragen Peptide (20mg)
description: Research-grade Pancragen tetrapeptide bioregulator for pancreatic cell studies. Lyophilized KEDW sequence supports metabolic research applications.

name: Ovagen Peptide (20mg)
description: Ovagen peptide bioregulator for liver and gastrointestinal tract research. High-purity tripeptide for in vitro applications.

name: Livagen Peptide (20mg)
description: Livagen lyophilized short peptide bioregulator for chromatin research. Khavinson tetrapeptide supports cellular gene expression studies.

name: Vilon Peptide (20mg)
description: Research-grade Vilon peptide (L-Lys-L-Glu) – synthetic dipeptide bioregulator for immune system and thymus studies. Research use only.

name: BioGutPro
description:
Advanced Gut Barrier and Regenerative Complex

BioGutPro is a next-generation regenerative research product meticulously formulated to assist clinicians in researching intestinal barrier integrity, promote gut healing, and reduce inflammation. It contains a synergistic blend of bioactive compounds—BPC-157 (1000 mcg per serving *), KPV (500 mcg per serving *), N-Acetyl Larazotide (500 mcg per serving *), GHK-CU (2 mg per serving *), CoreBiome® Tributyrin (400 mg per serving *), Sodium Bicarbonate (150 mg per serving *), and Zinc L-Carnosine (100 mg per serving *)—each carefully selected for its role in enhancing gut repair, modulating inflammatory responses, and optimizing mucosal protection.

* serving size = 2 capsules

name: BioMind
description:
An advanced research compound developed to investigate cognitive enhancement, neuroprotection, and synaptic plasticity in preclinical settings. It contains three powerful research molecules:

  • J-147 (10mg per serving *) – A neurotrophic and neuroprotective agent known for its potential to mitigate neurodegenerative processes.
  • Dihexa (10mg per serving *) – A potent synaptogenic compound that enhances neural connectivity and regeneration.
  • Noopept (10mg per serving *) – A nootropic peptide that supports memory formation, neuroprotection, and cognitive resilience.

* serving size = 2 capsules

name: BioRestore
description:
Advanced Oral Regeneration and Anti-Inflammatory Complex

BioRestore is a next-generation regenerative research product formulated to investigate tissue repair, inflammation reduction, and cellular recovery. It contains a synergistic blend of BPC-157 Arginine Salt (1000mcg per serving *), Palmitoylethanolamide (500mg per serving *), Hyaluronic Acid (100mg per serving *), and Sodium Bicarbonate (400mg per serving *) —each carefully selected for its studied role in enhancing recovery, modulating pain, and improving cellular resilience.

* serving size = 2 capsules

BioRestore is designed as a possible complement to traditional peptide and established regenerative therapies, potentially offering a comprehensive approach to healing and inflammation control.

name: BioSculpt Thermogenic Cream
description:
BioSculpt’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate metabolic capabilities of your body, promoting enhanced fat-burning and body sculpting.

Infused with potent bioregulators and thermogenic agents, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating stubborn body fat removal and improving muscle definition in leaner, fit individuals.

name: BioRegenix Recovery Cream
description:
BioRegnix’s advanced formulation harnesses the innate healing abilities of your body, promoting rapid soft tissue regeneration and repair.

Infused with potent bioregulators, it stimulates cellular activity at the molecular level, accelerating the healing process for soft tissue injuries, including aches, sprains, strains, and performance and age-related muscle pain.

name: Pinealon (20mg)
description: Pinealon, a synthetic tripeptide composed of Glu-Asp-Arg, has been studied for its potential neuroprotective and antioxidative properties. It has shown promise in various experimental models, particularly in relation to oxidative stress and neurodegenerative conditions.

name: Bronchogen (20mg)
description: Bronchogen is a tetrapeptide made up of four amino acids in sequence: Alanine-Glutamic acid-Aspartic acid-Leucine (Ala-Glu-Asp-Leu). It is a bioregulatory peptide primarily recognized for its role as a DNA-stabilizing agent and its potential bronchodilating and anti-inflammatory properties in respiratory conditions.

name: Cardiogen (20mg)
description: Cardiogen (AEDR) is a synthetic tetrapeptide with the sequence H-Ala-Glu-Asp-Arg-OH. It functions as a bioregulator peptide, primarily targeting fibroblasts and cardiomyocytes to modulate tissue repair and cardiovascular function.

name: Cartalax (20mg)
description: Cartalax (also known as AED or AC-4) is a tripeptide complex (alanine-glutamic acid-aspartic acid) that modulates cartilage and bone metabolism by targeting cellular pathways in chondrocytes and thyroid C cells.

name: Chonluten (20mg)
description: Chonluten, or tripeptide T-34, has been identified as a significant regulator in the expression of genes associated with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory proteins. This peptide plays a crucial role in the modulation of molecular and morphological changes.

name: Cortagen (20mg)
description: Cortagen is a synthetic tetrapeptide with the amino acid sequence Ala-Glu-Asp-Pro (AEDP). It belongs to the family of “Khavinson peptides,” which are short bioregulatory peptides typically composed of 2 to 4 amino acids. These peptides are known for their ability to influence gene expression in a tissue-specific manner and have been studied for their potential therapeutic effects on aging, inflammation, and tissue repair.

name: SHREDX
description:
SHREDX is a formulation designed for researchers examining outcomes related to endurance, metabolic optimization, and fat oxidation. It contains three research compounds:

SLU-PP 332: Promotes fat metabolism and energy utilization in animal models.

GW-501516: Shown to enhance endurance in preclinical studies

Lipotropin HCL-AOD 9604: Promotes the breakdown of fat and shows promise for the preservation of lean body mass.

name: Bonothyrk A-21 Parathyroid Peptide Bioregulator (Capsules)
description: Bonothyrk is a parathyroid peptide complex containing natural peptides isolated from the parathyroid glands of young, healthy animals that supports metabolism and functional activity of parathyroid gland cells.

name: Bonomarlot A-20 Bone Marrow Peptide Bioregulator (Capsules)
description: Bonomarlot is a natural peptide complex derived from the bone marrow of young animals that contains peptide complex A-20, which may selectively target and normalize the hematopoietic system.

name: Zhenoluten A-15 Ovary Peptide Bioregulator (Capsules)
description: Zhenoluten is a dietary supplement and ovary peptide bioregulator (A-15) containing a complex of natural peptides extracted from the ovaries of young animals.

name: Taxorest A-19 Lung Peptide Bioregulator (Capsules)
description: Taxorest is a dietary supplement formulated with natural bronchial mucous peptides to promote respiratory health by supporting the normalization of bronchial mucosa metabolism.
